title: What a godly man's private life reveals about his faith
caption:
The version of you that nobody sees is the real version of your faith.

What fills your unobserved hours tells you what you actually believe about God — not what you intend to believe. Intentions are what you tell people. Habits are what you tell yourself.

Most men have two versions: the one visible to others, and the one they actually are. That gap is the gap in their character. And living it is expensive — it costs clarity, peace, and eventually trust.

What you won't bring into the light doesn't go dormant. It operates below the surface, shaping your decisions, coloring how you talk to the people closest to you.

The test isn't who you are at church. It's who you are at midnight in a room with no one watching.

"I am a man of faith when I'm alone." Build toward that. Not because God needs the performance, but because integrity is a single thing. You can't split it.

God forms men in private. What he builds there, nothing public can shake.

#faith #integrity #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #thevision #formation #christianity #scripture
